summary: Both reviewers agree on: drop 'PTY is the queue' framing, commit to at-least-once, make sweep + dispatch log + async PTY writes v1 mandatory, lock schema as public API with parity test. They disagree on: exec in v1 (Codex no, Claude yes), topic fan-out in v1 (Claude cut, Codex keep), --via-ref in v1. My leans: defer exec, keep topic fan-out (cut registry), defer --via-ref.
title: Merged review synthesis (Claude + Codex)
